user_query:
I'm drowning in my DC backlog and need a tidy weekly update and planning package I can share with my fan club. Please use the following inputs:
- input/data/reading_log.csv
- input/data/backlog.csv
- input/meetings/agenda.md
- input/messaging/recipients.yaml

Deliverables:
1) Write a weekly progress summary to output/progress_summary.md that covers the last 7 days ending on the latest date found in input/data/reading_log.csv. Include:
  - The reporting window dates (start and end, inclusive).
  - Total completed items in the window, total minutes completed, and average minutes per completed item (round to 1 decimal).
  - A breakdown of completed items by universe with counts and minutes.
  - The IDs and titles of the top 3 completed items this week by minutes.
  - The overall backlog completion rate from input/data/backlog.csv as Completed/Total and as a percentage.
  - A short written summary (2–3 sentences) interpreting the progress.
  For verifiability: explicitly list the IDs completed this week and ensure they all appear in input/data/backlog.csv with status "Completed".

2) Draft a club update email at output/club_update_email.txt with:
  - A To: line containing the email addresses from input/messaging/recipients.yaml (the "to" list), comma-separated.
  - Subject: "Metropolis DC Fan Club Weekly Update - <end of reporting window date>".
  - A concise body that includes: (a) the headline weekly stats (total completed items, total minutes, average minutes, and backlog completion rate), (b) a bullet list of the next 5 priority-1 backlog items that are not completed (from input/data/backlog.csv), sorted by estimated minutes descending and showing each item's ID, title, universe, and est_minutes, and (c) a reminder of the next meeting date/time pulled from input/meetings/agenda.md.

3) Prepare pre-filled meeting notes at output/meeting_notes.md for the next club meeting using input/meetings/agenda.md. Include:
  - Title with the meeting name and the exact date/time from the agenda file.
  - Attendees list from the Participants line.
  - An Agenda Recap section listing the agenda items (you may omit the [ACTION] and [DECISION] tags in this recap).
  - A Decisions section listing any [DECISION] entries as plain statements.
  - An Action Items section where each [ACTION] line is extracted into entries with Assignee, Task, and Due. Also include a line "Total action items: N" where N is the count you extracted.

4) Export a machine-readable weekly universe breakdown to output/weekly_stats_by_universe.csv for the same reporting window with columns: universe,completed_items,total_minutes,avg_minutes (avg rounded to 1 decimal). Universes with zero completed items in the window can be omitted.

Notes and constraints:
- Determine the reporting window solely from input/data/reading_log.csv by taking the maximum date present and looking back 6 more days (7 days total).
- Completed items for weekly stats are reading_log rows within the window where status == "Completed".
- Backlog completion rate must be computed from input/data/backlog.csv as (number of rows with status == "Completed") / (total rows), shown as a fraction and percentage.
- Use only the provided files; do not fetch anything from the internet.
- All four deliverables must be created under the specified output/ paths. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
